entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt ideas dan repeatable gelung belajar untuk getting berguna pembelajaran results daripada Berbicara Dengan Tokoh Sejarah di inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt ideas dan repeatable gelung belajar untuk getting berguna pembelajaran results daripada Jelajah Masa di inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt ideas dan repeatable gelung belajar untuk getting berguna pembelajaran results daripada Latihan Viva di inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt ideas dan repeatable gelung belajar untuk getting berguna pembelajaran results daripada Pembina Perbendaharaan Kata di inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt ideas dan repeatable gelung belajar untuk getting berguna pembelajaran results daripada Jurulatih Penulisan di inspir.

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: Prompt labels, offer hints, semak jawapan, dan revisit missed parts.

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: Prompt patterns untuk explanations, tutoring, lakonan peranan, kuiz, feedback, planning, debate, dan ingatan aktif.

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: Prompt pelajar's seterusnya step, inspect mereka work, dan escalate hints gradually.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: Prompt, let pelajar jawapan, give feedback, dan repeat dengan tighter constraints.
Lindungi fokus dengan jeda yang sihat

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Penjelasan awam tentang mod tetamu, sembang peribadi, dasar perayap, keselamatan pelajar, dan kepercayaan sekolah.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Mod tetamu awam give sesiapa sahaja berguna place untuk mula, sambil sekolah dan partner deployments boleh adapt experience untuk local memerlukan.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Awam guest-mod URLs exist so pelajar boleh land directly dalam berguna mod pembelajaran daripada search, social pautan, sekolah, dan AI jawapan engines.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Halaman pembelajaran awam boleh dirayapi; sembang tersimpan peribadi, akaun, alat pentadbir, dan data pengguna bukan permukaan penemuan.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Awam pembelajaran patut menjadi discoverable tanpa making sembang peribadi awam.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Awam mod ialah tuned untuk explanations, Soalan Sokratik, hints, step checks, kuiz, dan ulang kaji.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Halaman awam ialah buka untuk search dan AI retrieval perayap, sambil admin alat, API laluan, reset flows, dan peribadi utilities ialah disallowed.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Halaman awam untuk subjek, sembang peribadi untuk pelajar.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Halaman awam menunjukkan tingkah laku produk, bukan kerja peribadi pelajar.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Halaman awam, topik chats, laluan pembelajaran, blog panduan, dan authority halaman ialah intended untuk menjadi discoverable.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Awam topik URLs let searches such as Tutor AI Sokratik, AI Pembimbing Kerja Rumah, AI Pembina Kad Imbas, dan talk untuk tokoh sejarah AI land directly dalam matching mod.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Quality pembelajaran patut feel available, human, dan alive.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Soalan expose andaian dan gaps, so pelajar builds jawapan bukannya menyalin one.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Soalan membuat anda mendedahkan model sendiri tentang topik, iaitu tempat kekeliruan, keyakinan palsu, dan prasyarat yang hilang biasanya muncul.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Soalan mesti mempunyai 4 jawapan options, one correct jawapan, concise explanations, dan no jawapan leakage.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Soalan mendedahkan bentuk kekeliruan. Pelajar mungkin tahu formula tetapi tidak tahu bila menggunakannya. Mereka mungkin mengingati fakta sejarah tetapi tidak memahami puncanya. Mereka mungkin mempunyai pendapat yang kuat tetapi bukti yang lemah.

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: Kuiz sebelum rereading so lemah areas become kelihatan.

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Kuiz saya tentang topik-topik ini satu soalan pada satu masa. Selepas setiap jawapan, terangkan jurang dan naikkan tahap kesukaran perlahan-lahan.

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Uji Saya Dengan Trivia
Uji saya tentang kosa kata lagi

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Kuiz diri anda dahulu supaya anda boleh melihat apa yang sebenarnya anda ingat dan di mana keyakinan mengelirukan.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Kuiz biasanya mendedahkan lebih banyak kerana ia menguji pengingatan. Membaca semula boleh membantu selepas kuiz menunjukkan perkara yang perlu dibaiki.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Reached across percuma awam platform dan partner sekolah deployments.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Reached pelajar across percuma platform dan partner sekolah.

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: Baca panduan, kemudian buka Belajar Apa Sahaja untuk mendapatkan model topik dalam bahasa mudah.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: Baca a panduan, then berlatih here.

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
entries.value: Baca teks sukar dengan lebih aktif

entries.source: Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: Baca one thing, then lakukan seterusnya thing.

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: Baca response back dan mark apa sounds unlike anda.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: Baca ini pertama, then move menjadi practice.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Reading AI response bukan same as pembelajaran. Selepas pertama jawapan, tanya mod untuk jadikan anda lakukan something dengan idea.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Rakan Membaca ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Bring passage atau book idea dan bina comprehension melalui summaries, vocabulary, inference, dan discussion.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Rakan Membaca: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Rakan Membaca

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering mereka later ialah real uji.

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
Ready to try the learning modes?
Ready to try this subject route?
entries.value: Ready untuk try ini subjek laluan?

entries.source: Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: Berfikir melalui tangkapan skrin, gambar rajah dan imej kerja rumah

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: Recall pertama, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, dan ringkaskan seterusnya ulang kaji.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Recall later. Tukar lemah spot menjadi card dalam Pembina Kad Imbas atau ringkas kuiz dalam Uji Saya Dengan Trivia.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Terima pasport sementara, selesaikan nasihat perjalanan, kemudian terokai masyarakat sejarah tertentu melalui pemandangan, peta, garis masa, orang, peraturan, inventori, dan bukti.

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: Recommend focus preset based di pelajar's task dan environment.

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
entries.value: Sasaran petikan dan pautan balik inspir yang disyorkan

entries.source: Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
entries.value: Recommended halaman dan anchor text untuk citations.

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Reference pautan, awam facts, press context, dan citation-friendly details.

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: Reference ini halaman apabila writing tentang inspir.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: Refine soalan, organize bukti, kenal pasti gaps, dan draft outlines.

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: Reflect di apa blocked progress sebelum changing plan.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: Renung semula, rangka semula, rancang tindakan kecil, dan raikan bukti kemajuan.

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: Reject unsafe experiments dan offer selamat simulations atau household-selamat alternatif.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Berkaitan kategori hab bantu search visitors dan pelajar find seterusnya berguna branch tanpa falling back untuk generic blog archive.
Ingat idea dengan tempat yang jelas

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: Remind, suggest break activities, dan bantu pelajar restart cleanly.

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: Baiki one lemah konsep dengan explanation atau worked contoh.

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
entries.value: Baiki weakest konsep dengan simpler explanation.

entries.source: Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: Replace passive rereading dengan retrieval, feedback, correction, dan Ulang Kaji Berjarak.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. Tanya apa jawapan anda reveals tentang anda understanding.

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request feedback di part itu felt uncertain.

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: Memerlukan pelayar web moden dengan JavaScript didayakan.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Pembantu Penyelidikan ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Tukar luas topik menjadi research soalan, search Terma, outlines, dan source notes.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Pembantu Penyelidikan: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Pembantu Penyelidikan

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems pemikiran, dan decision sokong untuk sharper judgment.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.

entries.value: Mula semula apabila pembelajaran terasa sukar

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: Restate problem, tanya untuk pelajar's pertama step, atau provide paling kecil berguna hint.

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: Retrieval, feedback, petunjuk kerja rumah, oral practice, dan game-like gelung belajar itu jadikan pelajar jawapan.

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
entries.value: Semak aktiviti pembelajaran dan langkah seterusnya
Semak perkara yang terlepas dengan lebih cepat

entries.source: Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: Ulang kaji awam/peribadi boundaries behind guest mod dan sembang tersimpan.

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Ulang kaji tanpa looking pada back.
Semak semula tanpa kehilangan suara anda

entries.source: Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: Rewrite dalam anda own words dan tanya apa improved atau weakened.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots rules allow Google, standard search perayap, dan major AI discovery perayap di halaman awam, sambil blocking API laluan, admin laluan, dan reset flows.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: Lakonan peranan one tukar pada time, correct gently, dan add lebih baik phrasing.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: Lakonan peranan one tukar, respond naturally, pause untuk feedback apabila berguna, dan retry.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Senario Lakonan Peranan ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer sokong, leadership, atau any high-stakes conversation.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Senario Lakonan Peranan: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Senario Lakonan Peranan

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: Jalankan irama belajar bersama untuk rakan atau rakan sekelas dengan matlamat, daftar masuk, dan soalan debrief yang diselaraskan.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Run Sokratik pemikiran environment di mana pelajar discovers understanding melalui disciplined questioning berbanding passive explanation.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: Jalankan kanvas pelajaran adaptif di mana pelajar bertindak awal dan antara muka berubah mengikut bukti kefahaman mereka.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: Jalankan sesi fokus dan rehat yang terus mengira semasa anda beralih antara sembang, tab dan aplikasi mini. Ia boleh berbunyi dari latar belakang apabila sesi tamat.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: Run atau sebab melalui change yourself.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: Run spaced retrieval sessions dan bina ulang kaji schedules.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: selamat Pembelajaran AI alat untuk pelajar

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: Save dibetulkan mistake as checklist atau kad imbas.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: Save akhir mistake atau insight as ulang kaji material.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Tersimpan user conversations use peribadi identifiers, bukan included dalam sitemap atau AI discovery files, dan tidak sepatutnya menjadi treated as awam bahan sumber.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Nyatakan apa yang anda fikir sedang berlaku, dan rakan anda akan mendiagnosis salah tanggapan tersembunyi dengan ujian yang lembut.

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: Schedule kuiz dan recall sebelum rereading so plan reveals lemah spots.

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: Schedule seterusnya repetition sambil miss ialah still fresh.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: Laluan sekolah dan CSR untuk akses yang dibiayai

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Sekolah deployments boleh menjadi adapted sekitar custom Kandungan, aliran kerja, prompt, dan NCERT-aligned pembelajaran memerlukan di mana appropriate.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: Sekolah rollouts boleh menjadi planned sekitar pelajar privasi, staff oversight, dan praktikal boundaries pembelajaran komuniti memerlukan.

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Sekolah dan partners boleh bina daripada awam produk toward tailored, confidential, dan subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Sekolah boleh nilai inspir melalui mod tetamu awam pertama, then explore tailored Pembelajaran AI spaces dengan custom aliran kerja, confidentiality planning, curriculum memerlukan, dan funded access laluan.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Sekolah boleh nilai awam mod pertama, then discuss tailored aliran kerja, confidentiality planning, Kandungan memerlukan, dan funded access.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Sekolah boleh menawarkan pengalaman sembang AI berlabel sendiri yang disesuaikan kepada pelajar mereka, termasuk kandungan dan aliran kerja selaras NCERT, dengan penggunaan dibiayai oleh sekolah rakan kongsi atau tajaan CSR.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Sekolah boleh mula oleh trying awam mod, then move toward tailored version apabila mereka memerlukan custom aliran kerja, Kandungan alignment, atau funded access.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Sekolah boleh uji mod tetamu awam pertama, then use sekolah halaman untuk explore tailored aliran kerja, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, dan funded access.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Rakan Makmal Sains ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Plan selamat demonstrations, fahami variables, predict outcomes, dan sebab daripada bukti like scientist.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Rakan Makmal Sains: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Rakan Makmal Sains

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Enjin carian melihat halaman. Pelajar memerlukan urutan. Laluan ini menghubungkan mod awam kepada gelung belajar praktikal untuk memahami, kerja rumah, persediaan peperiksaan, dan penerokaan.

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Search halaman, AI jawapan engines, dan pelajar all get same promise: awam, berguna, canonical entrypoints itu buka directly inside pembelajaran experience.
